_comment: Snap-to zoom tiers for mobile 4X viewport. Tiers define visual LOD transitions.

tactical._comment: Unit models, building details, terrain features, thick network lines with particles, resource markers with quantities

default._comment: Units as icons, buildings as silhouettes, terrain colors, medium network lines with glow, small resource dots

strategic._comment: Ownership colors, city icons, unit group indicators, thin steady network lines, no resource markers

world._comment: Full map overview, city dots only, faint tracery lines, no units visible

_comment_transitionDuration: Seconds for smooth lerp between zoom tier boundaries
_comment_snapThreshold: Fraction of tier range — if camera is within this fraction of a tier boundary, snap to that tier
_comment_minScreenTileWidth: Minimum 1px screen-space width for network lines at any zoom
